chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3320 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on Misc. For hearing of main case 11.9.2025 Mr. Kaleemullah Burdi advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
